reviews.review_description: Captain Cat is a must-have VR game for your Quest library. I’ve been playing it a lot lately, and the game keeps giving me new quests, things to explore, and plenty to do. I love the atmosphere, the music, and the design of the cats and their village. For me, it’s a strong 10/10. I recommend you drop everything else and play it now at least to get your cozy fix for the day!
This game is pure comfort. No stress, no pressure, just gentle exploration. It’s become my go to game when I want to unwind.
I played this with my kid watching, and we both loved it. It’s friendly, colorful, and easy to understand.
The islands are fun to explore, and the cat theme adds a lot of charm. I just wish there were more long-term goals.

reviews.review_title: 🐱 A Cozy Adventure Full of Charm
reviews.review_description:
Captain Cat is a cozy, colorful adventure that’s beautifully executed from start to finish. The game invites you to slow down and let the story carry you through an enchanting world filled with personality and warmth ✨

Fans of Animal Crossing and Stardew Valley will immediately feel at home—this kind of relaxing, wholesome genre is rare on Meta Quest, and it’s wonderful to see it done so well. You guide your character and boat through multiple adventures, meet memorable characters, discover new places, collect items, and sell your finds at your own pace 🗺️

Fishing in VR is especially satisfying here, and for once it truly feels fun and meaningful—something fans of cozy games will really appreciate 🎣
A charming, feel-good experience for anyone looking to escape into a gentle and magical world. Highly recommended 💛
worth the money, enjoyed my free time with this game ❤️
more stuff needed to make game more alive
This is one of those games where you don’t realize how long you’ve been playing. Time just kind of disappears.
Everything about Captain Cat feels gentle and intentional. The art style, music, and pacing all work together really well.
Finally something a bit different, I wish more games would be like this one
Lovely little world to wander through
Charming island cat vibes and cozy gameplay
